title: SCP-075, The Corrosive Snail
description: Don’t underestimate the Corrosive Snail... It's deadly and corrosive.
body:
The Corrosive Snail adds a new entity. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-075, also known as The Corrosive Snail.


This snail is unlike any other, capable of climbing walls and leaping like a spider, leaving a dangerous trail of corrosive particles wherever it goes. Only a single instance of SCP-075 can exist in the world at any time. It is highly resistant, moves at high speeds, and attacks by dealing the Wither and Corrosion effects on its target. SCP-075 can also enter a Dormant State if standing on sand, red sand, or soul sand. In this state, it appears harmless, but attacking it or changing the block beneath it to something like dirt, grass, mud or else will instantly awaken it.

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why can't I summon a mob?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Where does SCP-075 spawn?

SCP-075 can spawn anywhere on the overworld surface during night like a normal monster. However, there can only one instance of SCP-075

</details>



![SCP-075](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a19f59c91b0311db8fd51a41cda9108a81660129.png)

SCP-075 is a large, highly aggressive snail with a muscular foot resembling a six-fingered, clawed hand. Despite its size, it is unnervingly fast, able to climb vertical surfaces and leap short distances like a spider. SCP-075 leaves behind a constant trail of corrosive particles. When being aggressive towards players, SCP-075 will break blocks infront of it. Its also applies both Wither and Corrosion effect to it's victims when it attacks. If the block beneath it is sand, red sand, or soul sand, and no player is nearby or it is not aggressive, SCP-075 can enter a Dormant State and remaining motionless. Disturbing this state by reducing its health below 90, or changing the block beneath it to blocks like dirt, grass, mud, water, or honey will reawaken it. Also, you can transport SCP-075 with boats or minecarts if it's in his dormant state, allowing you to contain it, since only one SCP-075 can spawn in your world.

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
